Interface ILasToRasterFunctionArguments4

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control Las to raster conversion.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("222F2EC8-CE94-4963-A70A-CEA84D7D832D")]
public interface ILasToRasterFunctionArguments4 : ILasToRasterFunctionArguments3, ILasToRasterFunctionArguments2, ILasToRasterFunctionArguments
